articles.title: General Intuition raises $2.3B on bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
articles.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

articles.title: Parker Conrad knows which employees are worth their AI spend and says Rippling can help you, too
articles.description: "There were employees doing things like, 'Claude is so helpful for me — it analyzes my calendar and my email and puts together a plan for me,'" he says. "That person was spending at a run rate of $30,000 a year for this."

articles.title: Google Finance gets a dedicated app for Android
articles.description: Users will be able to access their watchlists, real-time market data, live financial news, and Google's AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, which explains why stocks moved.

articles.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
articles.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

articles.title: Trump admin bars Polestar from selling its new EVs in the US
articles.description: The Department of Commerce declined to give the Chinese-owned automaker a special authorization to keep selling EVs in the U.S.

articles.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
articles.description: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro.

articles.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
articles.description: 2 days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

articles.title: Trump admin proposes axing brake-pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
articles.description: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."

articles.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
articles.description: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

articles.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
articles.description: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

articles.title: Cellebrite said it cut off Russia, but Russia used its tools anyway
articles.description: Security researchers found evidence that Russian authorities hacked the iPhone of a political opponent using a phone-unlocking device made by Cellebrite, even after the company said it would stop selling to Putin’s government.

articles.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
articles.description: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.

articles.title: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
articles.description: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

articles.title: Elon suffers another day short of trillionaire status
articles.description: Right now he's merely a several-hundred-billionaire, according to Bloomberg's Billionaires Index.

articles.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
articles.description: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

articles.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
articles.description: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

articles.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
articles.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

articles.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
articles.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

articles.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users
articles.description: According to a new site, 24% of the most popular websites in the world don't offer support for passkeys, which are considered the most secure way to log in to apps and services.

articles.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
articles.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

articles.title: Feds deny Polestar authorization to sell cars in US from model year 2027
articles.description: Unlike with Volvo, there will be no authorization for Polestar to sell its cars here.

articles.title: Apple ratchets up prices, blames the cost of memory
articles.description: Some Macs are hundreds of dollars more expensive today than yesterday.

articles.title: The "sad inevitability" of Europe's heat wave
articles.description: Europeans are baking under their second heat wave of the summer.

articles.title: New effort will get genome sequences for entire Endangered Species list
articles.description: Colossal Biosciences will be biobanking tissues from all of them as well.

articles.title: Every Homo naledi we know of is female, and the implications are fascinating
articles.description: "There is no natural explanation," says paleoanthropologist John Hawks.

articles.title: IBM claims world’s first sub-1 nanometer chip technology
articles.description: IBM’s nanostack transistors could boost chip performance or energy efficiency.

articles.title: Hotly anticipated Grand Theft Auto VI will cost more than other AAA games
articles.description: GTA6 might be an outlier, though—at least for now.

articles.title: OpenAI and Broadcom announce chip designed for LLM inference at scale
articles.description: The silicon race is heating up amid the struggle to keep up with demand.

articles.title: 13 years and $500 million for a stage adapter? Report justifies NASA cancellations.
articles.description: "Contract values for these efforts ballooned from nearly $2.8 billion to $5.9 billion."

articles.title: US ends hantavirus outbreak response with no answers on draconian quarantines
articles.description: We still don't know why RFK Jr. overruled CDC expert to order strict quarantines.

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.description: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.

articles.title: Underpromise, overdeliver? Hands-on with the $24,950 Slate auto.
articles.description: It has 205 miles of bare-bones range.

articles.title: Disney agreed to $50M settlement over claims it made live-TV streaming expensive
articles.description: Lawsuit alleged Disney inflated market prices by making carriers include ESPN.

articles.title: Experimental wine bottle tracks oxygen moving through the cork
articles.description: The small bit of air in the bottle sees oxygen and other chemicals move in and out.

articles.title: FCC plans ID mandate that could block anonymous use of prepaid burner phones
articles.description: Privacy advocates and domestic violence groups say ID mandate is a big mistake.

articles.title: Formula E reveals first calendar for GEN4 with lots of real race tracks
articles.description: Brands Hatch, COTA, and Zandvoort will all hold an e-Prix in 2027.

articles.title: Google starts lowering Play Store fees, making good on Epic Games settlement
articles.description: A few additional markets will get the lower fees this year ahead of a global rollout in 2027.

articles.title: Elon Musk denies Tesla’s Autopilot caused crash that killed grandmother
articles.description: Tesla, accused of failing to fix design flaws, blames driver pressing accelerator.

articles.title: Military branches restore flu shot requirement after virus swept through base
articles.description: Branches received exceptions to Hegseth's policy that made the shot optional.

articles.title: Slate Auto's truck builder goes live for its $25k electric pickup
articles.description: From a bare-bones pickup to a loaded, wrapped SUV, here's what some Slates will cost.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI训练与投资**：General Intuition获23亿美元融资，押注通过视频游戏训练AI代理以应用于现实世界；Netris获a16z 1500万美元A轮融资，助力AI云服务快速上线。
2. **企业AI与人事管理**：Rippling创始人Parker Conrad宣称能识别哪些员工值得企业投入AI成本，并推出相关工具；苹果上调Mac和iPad价格，但暂未调整iPhone。
3. **政策与监管动向**：特朗普政府拟取消自动驾驶汽车的刹车踏板要求，利好特斯拉；同时禁止Polestar在美销售新款电动车，并提议削减对欧洲芯片战的限制。
4. **科技巨头投资与收购**：亚马逊向印度追加130亿美元AI基础设施投资；Adobe收购图像视频增强工具开发商Topaz Labs；Google Finance推出安卓专用应用。
5. **行业争议与市场波动**：Cellebrite被曝切断对俄服务后，其工具仍被俄罗斯使用；Cerebras股价因财报与CEO对利润率预期的误解而暴跌；前Infosys CEO创办新公司挑战IT服务业。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：General Intuition以23亿美元融资规模领跑，表明“游戏训练AI”正成为资本重仓的新赛道，可能重塑AI代理的实用化路径。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型优化与评估**：Hugging Face发布多项技术进展，包括混合模型预测能力分析、基于NVIDIA NeMo的Transformer微调加速、FFASR语音识别基准测试，以及PP-OCRv6多语言OCR模型（参数规模从1.5M到34.5M）。
2. **AI代理与工具链**：Hugging Face推出CUGA轻量级框架的24个实用代理应用示例，并探索Transformers.js中的跨源存储API；OpenAI聚焦代理如何改变工作方式，并展示Omio在对话式旅行领域的实践。
3. **芯片与安全**：OpenAI与Broadcom联合发布面向LLM推理优化的芯片；同时出现针对AI研究模型的安全挑战（如MosaicLeaks数据泄露问题）。
4. **开源与协作**：Hugging Face实现每周自动化发布huggingface_hub（结合AI与人工审核），并利用本地模型对OpenClaw仓库进行免费分类；OpenAI推动高级AI共享标准建设。
5. **前沿应用**：GPT-5助力免疫学家解决持续三年的科学谜题；Google Finance推出重大升级与新应用。

**今日最值得关注**：OpenAI与Broadcom合作推出的LLM专用推理芯片，标志着AI硬件从通用计算向专用优化的关键转折，可能大幅降低大模型部署成本。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **交通与基础设施**：中国将于7月1日起实施新的列车运行图，其中包括开通北京至乌鲁木齐的高速铁路服务，进一步提升区域联通性。
2. **科技与人工智能**：中国在AI领域取得多项进展，包括360公司开发出可媲美Anthropic Mythos的工具，并声称研发出类似“网络核武器”的AI技术；同时，中国AI实验室的内部动态也受到关注。
3. **新能源与制造业**：中国电动汽车出口在5月创历史新高，新电动汽车品牌持续涌现，同时中国在机器人制造领域占据主导地位，凸显其制造业优势。
4. **航天与国防**：中国“千帆星座”（SpaceSail）计划被指可能与美国星链（Starlink）竞争；此外，日本防卫力量被发现使用含中国关联病毒的USB设备，引发网络安全关注。
5. **经济与能源**：中国煤电在2026年出现反弹，逆转十年来首次下降趋势；同时，中国在超级计算机领域以2.2 Exaflops性能超越美国，位居全球最快。

今日最值得关注的发展是中国在AI和新能源领域的持续突破，尤其是电动汽车出口创新高以及AI工具与超级计算机的领先表现，凸显中国在科技与绿色经济中的全球竞争力。
